description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages named check and copy. In the check stage add a print-env job that runs the commands whoami, pwd, echo $PATH, and export CUR_PATH=$(pwd). In the copy stage add a copy-env job that runs export REMOTE_PATH="/home/gitlab-runner/go/src/gitlab.com/eunleem/gopack", creates the directory with mkdir -p $REMOTE_PATH, removes any .git folder with rm -rf ./.git, and copies the repository contents to $REMOTE_PATH with cp -r ./ $REMOTE_PATH. Use the default GitLab runner image and no additional services, caches, artifacts, or trigger rules.
